name: /postmortem --draft-detector scaffolds a detector script under rubric/detectors/_draft/ per F-1 detector-contract scaffold clause
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" 'unsigned commit' --draft-detector 2>err.txt && ls rubric/detectors/_draft/postmortem-*-unsigned-commit.sh >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -q 'detector contract' rubric/detectors/_draft/postmortem-*-unsigned-commit.sh && echo drafted 1>&2
